name: presentation-advantage
description: Kory Kogon, Breck England, and Julie Schmidt's 'Presentation Advantage: How to Inform and Persuade Any Audience' — a FranklinCovey guide to powerful presenting. The 3-D system: Develop a message, Design visuals, Deliver with excellence. Covers connecting with your audience in an age of distraction, character-based credibility, storytelling, and the 'real job' of a knowledge worker.
useCase: Improving presentation skills, creating effective PowerPoint/visual aids, engaging distracted audiences, developing compelling key messages, delivering with confidence, and persuading decision makers.
knownRisks: Does not cover AI/presentation tools available today
